objective: Bootstrap worktree squad loops and retrospective-ready process.
whatWentWell: Clear separation of Samwise orchestration and squad-leader execution responsibilities.
Protected-main and isolated-worktree authorization rules were codified early.
whatDidNot: Calibration and loop-log tooling were initially missing and had to be added after qualification review.
openQuestions: How much process overhead will this introduce during very small tickets?
improvements: Run a calibration pass after one full assignment cycle.
Have Rosie mine diary and retrospective artifacts for recurring recommendations.
actionItems: Owner: Samwise - Run first full loop and close with retrospective at next checkpoint.
Owner: Rosie - Run retrospective gardening pass after first real loop closes.
